subcodes.first_line: O Pen of Eternity! Inscribe upon the Tablet what God hath cast unto thee in the realm of immortality ere it be joined [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلم القدم فالق علی اللوح ما القاک الله فی عالم البقا قبل ان یقترن
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @Manifestation of God as sun, @station of the Manifestation of God, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
